---
# Design System: Solace
**Project ID:** [projectId]

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere
- Style: Glassmorphism + Neumorphism hybrid design
- Large sections: Neumorphism surfaces with soft sculpted depth
- Supporting layers: Glassmorphism panels with frosted glass treatment
- Depth model: layered shadows
- Mood: calm, premium, restorative
- Density: comfortable

## 2. Color Palette & Roles
- **Background** (#f7fafc) – soft mist page background
- **Surface** (#edf2f7) – primary content surfaces and large sections
- **Surface Secondary** (#ffffffcc) – translucent supporting panels
- **Border** (#e2e8f0) – subtle separators and strokes
- **Primary Accent** (#1a365d) – main CTAs and navigation emphasis
- **Success** (#38a169) – positive feedback and completed states
- **Warning** (#dd6b20) – warning and attention states
- **Destructive** (#e53e3e) – destructive actions and critical errors
- **Text Primary** (#1f2937) – headlines and core labels
- **Text Secondary** (#718096) – body copy and metadata
- **Text Muted** (#a0aec0) – placeholders and inactive labels

## 3. Typography Rules
- Font: Montserrat for headings, Inter for body
- Display: 48px / 700 / 1.1
- Heading: 32px / 600 / 1.2
- Body: 16px / 400 / 1.6
- Caption/Label: 12px / 500 / 1.4

## 4. Component Styles
- Large Sections: Neumorphism containers, 24px radius, soft inset/outset shadows
- Supporting Panels: Glassmorphism cards, translucent fill, frosted blur, thin white border
- Buttons: 44px height, 12px radius, layered shadow on hover
- Inputs: 44px height, subtle border, focused ring in primary accent
- Cards/Panels: 20px radius, layered shadow depth, optional frosted support treatment

## 5. Layout Principles
- Sidebar: 280px / Topbar: 72px / Content max-width: 1440px / Grid unit: 8px
- Responsive tiers:
	- pc: `1920` to `1600`
	- laptop: `1600` to `1200`
	- tablet: `1200` to `900`
	- mini-tablet: `900` to `700`
	- mobile: below `700`

## 6. Design System Block for Stitch Prompts
**DESIGN SYSTEM (REQUIRED):**
- Platform: Web, Desktop-first
- Style: Glassmorphism + Neumorphism hybrid design
- Large sections: Neumorphism
- Supporting surfaces: Glassmorphism
- Depth: layered shadows
- Material: frosted glass
- Theme: Light, calm, premium wellness
- Background: Soft Mist (#f7fafc)
- Surface: Cloud White (#edf2f7)
- Primary Accent: Deep Ocean Blue (#1a365d)
- Text Primary: Slate Ink (#1f2937)
- Text Secondary: Calm Slate (#718096)
- Font: Montserrat + Inter, 16px base, 1.6 line-height
- Radius: 24px cards, 12px inputs, 999px pills
- Spacing: 8px grid unit
- Responsive tiers: pc `1920-1600`, laptop `1600-1200`, tablet `1200-900`, mini-tablet `900-700`, mobile `<700`
